summary: Iteration 101: Operator Scope Filter feature tested. Backend API /api/operators/by-service returns operators filtered by service type. All service endpoints (restaurants, events, cinema, pressing, hotels, travel) accept operator_id query param for filtering. Frontend OperatorScopeFilter component renders on management pages for admin users with intelligent operator filtering by service type.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/operators/by-service correctly filters operators by service_type (travel, restaurant, hotel, cinema, pressing, events)
Backend includes multi-service operators in all service type filters
All service endpoints (restaurants, events, cinema, pressing, hotels, travel) accept operator_id query param
Frontend shows operator dropdown with search functionality
Frontend shows badge with selected operator name and clear button
Component only renders for admin/super_admin users (returns null for operators)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - OperatorScopeFilter verified on Travel and Restaurant management pages

seed_data_creation: None - used existing operators: Musango (travel), Oryno (multi), West Region Tours (travel)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Operator Scope Filter feature fully implemented. OperatorScopeFilter component is integrated in 9 management pages (Travel, Restaurant, Cinema, Events, Laundry, Banquet, Package, Hotel, CarRental). The component calls /api/operators/by-service?service_type=X to get relevant operators. When user selects an operator, the management page re-fetches data with operator_id param. Default 'all' shows cumulative data. Known operator IDs: Musango=management-scope-v1 (travel), Oryno=management-scope-v1 (multi), West Region=management-scope-v1 (travel).

endpoints_tested: GET /api/operators/by-service - returns all active operators (3 found)
GET /api/pressing/?operator_id=<id> - filters pressing shops by operator

features: OperatorScopeFilter component renders on Travel Management page for admin users
OperatorScopeFilter component renders on Restaurant Management page for admin users
Dropdown shows 'All Operators (N)' as default option
Dropdown shows operators filtered by service type with operator_type badge
Selecting operator shows badge with operator name and X clear button
Selecting operator triggers data re-fetch with operator_id param
